section_name: Issuance and Renewal of Drive-a-way In-transit License
text: The department shall issue to an applicant on the filing of the application and the payment of the fee a drive-a-way in-transit license and in-transit license plates.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.035 — Issuance and Renewal of Drive-a-way In-transit License

The department shall issue to an applicant on the filing of the application and the payment of the fee a drive-a-way in-transit license and in-transit license plates.

*Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 732 (H.B.2651), Sec. 10, eff. September 1, 2007.*

subsections.text: The department shall issue to an applicant on the filing of the application and the payment of the fee a drive-a-way in-transit license and in-transit license plates.
